compiled_state.author: RebarBotNava
compiled_state.description:
## What

`docs/output-schemas.md` points readers at a source path that no longer exists and
describes a bash shell-out design that was removed. It says the machinery "lives in
one place — `src/rebar/_engine/ticket_output.py` … the bash commands shell into it"
(lines ~23-25) and references the bash emitter again (~line 80).

Reality on `origin/main`:
- `src/rebar/_engine/ticket_output.py` does not exist.
- The parser lives at `src/rebar/_engine_support/output.py` (`parse_output`,
  `error_envelope`) and is called **in-process** — there is no bash shell-out.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `docs/output-schemas.md` cites the correct module path
      (`src/rebar/_engine_support/output.py`).
- [ ] All "bash commands shell into it" / bash-emitter framing is replaced with the
      accurate in-process description.
- [ ] The doc no longer references any non-existent `_engine/ticket_output.py` path.

Files: `docs/output-schemas.md` (lines ~23-25 and ~80).
compiled_state.title: P1: Fix output-schemas.md stale source path & bash-shelling framing
